'''badhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cubically|cubically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-dh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cubically|cubically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| badhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:badhate|badhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:badhatesher|badhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:badhatesherĂ«m|badhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:badhatero|badhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:badhateshĂ«|badhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:badhateshĂ«m|badhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibadhatero|gokibadhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibadhateshĂ«|gokibadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibadhateshĂ«m|gokibadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobadhankerom|gobadhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobadhankeshĂ«|gobadhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobadhankeshĂ«m|gobadhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobadhankeya|gobadhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:badhaterom|badhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:badhatemu|badhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:badhateya|badhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibadhaterom|gokibadhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibadhatemu|gokibadhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibadhateya|gokibadhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:badhadhate|badhadhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:badhadhatesher|badhadhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:badhadhatesherĂ«m|badhadhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:badhadhatero|badhadhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:badhadhateshĂ«|badhadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:badhadhateshĂ«m|badhadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibadhadhatero|gokibadhadhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibadhadhateshĂ«|gokibadhadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibadhadhateshĂ«m|gokibadhadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobadhadhankerom|gobadhadhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobadhadhankeshĂ«|gobadhadhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobadhadhankeshĂ«m|gobadhadhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobadhadhankeya|gobadhadhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:badhadhaterom|badhadhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:badhadhatemu|badhadhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:badhadhateya|badhadhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibadhadhaterom|gokibadhadhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibadhadhatemu|gokibadhadhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibadhadhateya|gokibadhadhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:bĂŠdhĂŠte|bĂŠdhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bĂŠdhĂŠtesher|bĂŠdhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠdhĂŠtesherĂ«m|bĂŠdhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bĂŠdhĂŠtero|bĂŠdhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«|bĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m|bĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibĂŠdhĂŠtero|gokibĂŠdhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«|gokibĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokibĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobĂŠdhĂŠnkerom|gobĂŠdhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gobĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gobĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobĂŠdhĂŠnkeya|gobĂŠdhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bĂŠdhĂŠterom|bĂŠdhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠdhĂŠtemu|bĂŠdhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bĂŠdhĂŠteya|bĂŠdhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibĂŠdhĂŠterom|gokibĂŠdhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibĂŠdhĂŠtemu|gokibĂŠdhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibĂŠdhĂŠteya|gokibĂŠdhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:bafdhafte|bafdhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bafdhaftesher|bafdhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafdhaftesherĂ«m|bafdhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bafdhaftero|bafdhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bafdhafteshĂ«|bafdhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafdhafteshĂ«m|bafdhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibafdhaftero|gokibafdhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibafdhafteshĂ«|gokibafdhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibafdhafteshĂ«m|gokibafdhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobafdhafnkerom|gobafdhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobafdhafnkeshĂ«|gobafdhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobafdhafnkeshĂ«m|gobafdhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobafdhafnkeya|gobafdhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bafdhafterom|bafdhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafdhaftemu|bafdhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bafdhafteya|bafdhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibafdhafterom|gokibafdhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibafdhaftemu|gokibafdhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibafdhafteya|gokibafdhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
